channel.title: Teamwork on CEDIS/UnB
channel.description: Recent content in Teamwork on CEDIS/UnB

item.title: Teamwork and Soft Skills
item.description: The area of Teamwork and Soft Skills is an interdisciplinary field in project management and software development, emphasizing the importance of interpersonal and behavioral skills for the success of IT teams.

item.title: Volunteer team, asynchronous testing: an undergraduate thesis builds a QA strategy in pandemic times
item.description: Vítor Cardoso Xoteslem defended at FCTE/UnB an undergraduate thesis crafting a testing strategy for the Doarti app — maintained by a geographically distributed volunteer team under pandemic-forced remote work.

item.title: Team based learning gets a platform undergraduate thesis moves the methodology from the classroom to the cloud
item.description: Victor Hugo Arnaud Deon defended at FCTE/UnB an undergraduate thesis developing PGTBL — an open-source platform to manage Team-Based Learning activities in university courses.

item.title: Experience bases: what to do with the knowledge that walks in and out of R&D labs
item.description: Attany Nathaly Lima Araújo defended at FCTE/UnB an undergraduate thesis designing a process for building experience bases in R&D labs — a classic knowledge management challenge applied to software engineering.

item.title: Hase human aspects in software engineering
item.description: Ongoing project on human aspects in software engineering.
